title: trifolium circumdatum
intro: Trifolium circumdatum, also known as the yellow salsify or round-leaved salsify, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family, native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its roots and leaves. The health benefits of Trifolium circumdatum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Trifolium circumdatum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
